topic: What is the FDA approval status of GLP-1 agonists for non-diabetic obesity?

verifier_notes.text: Cross-checked Wegovy approval date against FDA drug-approval database — matches 2021-06-04.
STEP-1 trial citation verified against PubMed PMID 33567185.

assistant_synthesis: GLP-1 receptor agonists are FDA-approved for chronic weight management in non-diabetic adults under specific indications: semaglutide 2.4mg (Wegovy, approved 2021) and tirzepatide (Zepbound, approved 2023). Approvals require BMI ≥ 30, or BMI ≥ 27 with at least one weight-related comorbidity. Long-term cardiovascular outcomes (SELECT trial, 2023) show a 20% reduction in MACE for high-risk patients. Compounded GLP-1 products carry an FDA warning. Coverage under Medicare Part D excludes weight-loss-only prescriptions per statute.
